name: Zucchini Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the zucchini and water until soft.
2. Add Sure-Jell and bring to a rolling boil.
3. Stir in sugar and crushed pineapple.
4. Continue boiling for 5 minutes.
5. Remove from heat, then stir in apricot Jello until well combined.
6. Pack into sterilized jars and seal.
